assertionResults.title: returns false for big_toys

assertionResults.title: returns bestseller for rank 0

assertionResults.title: returns high_demand for rank 1

assertionResults.title: returns parent_favourite for rank 2 and 3

assertionResults.title: returns null for rank >= 4

assertionResults.title: has labels for all tag types
